stemHtml: A DME ground station can generally respond to a maximum of 100 aircraft at once. What is the reason for this limitation?

options.a: The difference in strengths of the received signals CANNOT be differentiated by the DME ground station, and consequently the weakest signals fall off.
options.b: Saturation of the DME receivers in the aircraft, receiving all interrogations of other aircraft in the vicinity that are on the same frequency.
options.c: Limitation of transmission by the echo protection circuit, which avoids replies being reflected and coming back into the DME ground station.
options.d: Saturation of the DME ground station working on only one receive frequency and one transmit frequency.
